description: User navigates from the address input page to the 'How can we help you?' selection screen.
frame_description: The screen transitions from an address entry field to a page asking the user's intent (buy or refinance).

description: User navigates to the home loan interest rates comparison results page.
page_title: Compare Home Loan Interest Rates From 5.19%
frame_description: The screen transitions to a page displaying various home loan interest rates and lender logos.

description: User scrolls down the comparison page to view additional tools and partner lender logos.
page_title: Compare Home Loan Interest Rates From 5.19%
frame_description: The page content moves vertically, revealing the 'Tools to make your search easier' section.

description: User navigates away from the comparison site to a Google search results page for 'home loans comparison'.
frame_description: The browser displays a list of search results on Google.

description: User scrolls through the Google search results to evaluate different lender options.
frame_description: The search results page moves vertically as the user scans the listings.

description: User clicks on the ANZ 'Home Loan Comparison Tool' search result.
interaction_target: Home Loan Comparison Tool - Compare ... | ANZ
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the ANZ link in the search results.

description: User navigates to the ANZ website from the Google search results.
frame_description: The browser loads the ANZ home loans comparison page.

description: User pauses on the ANZ page to review the 'Show me my options' filtering tool.
frame_description: The user remains on the ANZ page, examining the radio buttons for loan types and purposes.
